name: r
notes: R has no dedicated function-declaration node — function definitions are binary_operator nodes whose rhs is a function_definition. Both <- and = are valid assignment ops; both must be matched. Tags/refs queries are verbatim from upstream queries/tags.scm.

queries.tags:
(binary_operator lhs: (identifier) @name operator: "<-" rhs: (function_definition)) @definition.function
(binary_operator lhs: (identifier) @name operator: "=" rhs: (function_definition)) @definition.function
(binary_operator lhs: (string) @name operator: "<-" rhs: (function_definition)) @definition.function
(binary_operator lhs: (string) @name operator: "=" rhs: (function_definition)) @definition.function
